title: Whale Wallet Watchlist
description: Monitor a list of whale wallets in real-time — subscribe to live transaction streams for multiple addresses and alert when they move large amounts.
useCase: Build a whale alert dashboard that monitors 10-50 known smart money wallets simultaneously and fires notifications the moment any of them execute a transaction above a threshold.

keyParams.walletAddresses: Array of whale wallet addresses to monitor simultaneously
keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to monitor — e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet
keyParams.minValueUsd: Minimum USD transaction value to trigger an alert
